curation_notes: Patch modifies only PomParser.java (plus a trivial pom.xml java-level bump). The fix replaces FileCallable with MasterToSlaveFileCallable to restrict agent-to-controller execution, and removes the empty checkRoles stub. The vulnerable function is getPom(), which uses DocumentBuilderFactory.newInstance().newDocumentBuilder().parse() without disabling external entities. No sibling parsers in the same directory use FileCallable or XML parsing, so no additional locations were added. Pre-assigned class xxe (CWE-611) is correct — the advisory explicitly describes external entity extraction and SSRF.
